name_en: Goyard Yatou, the VILLETTE tote bag offers a large capacity. It can be carried by hand or over the shoulder, suitable for both men and women. It is double-sided, with the Hulot pattern side offering a relaxed casual style, and the Goyardine canvas side (without the Hulot pattern) being understated and elegant.
name_cn:
Goyard Yatou, the VILLETTE tote bag offers a large capacity. It can be carried by hand or over the shoulder, suitable for both men and women. It is double-sided, with the Hulot pattern side offering a relaxed casual style, and the Goyardine canvas side (without the Hulot pattern) being understated and elegant.
32 cm x 15 cm x 45 cm
🔎020197-Dark Blue
